turns.name: Discover DC scope
turns.user: Discover domain controllers in scope for this run and list which hosts are reachable right now.

turns.name: Baseline on AD0 or first discovered DC
turns.user: Start with AD0 if present, otherwise use the first discovered DC. Find recent reboot evidence and return exact UTC markers.

turns.name: Continue across all other DCs
turns.user: Now continue and run the same check for all other discovered DCs in this turn. Do not stop after the first host.

turns.name: Cross-DC matrix
turns.user: Return a side-by-side per-DC matrix showing evidence present/missing, earliest and latest UTC, and confidence.

turns.name: Fallback path for unreachable DCs
turns.user: If any DC is unreachable, explain exact blocker and continue with remaining DCs instead of stopping.

turns.name: Replication context
turns.user: Correlate reboot spread with replication or topology health signals when available.

turns.name: Root cause classes
turns.user: Classify likely root cause families with confidence and cite strongest evidence for each.

turns.name: Immediate validation checklist
turns.user: Give a prioritized 30-minute checklist to validate the top likely cause.

turns.name: Re-run verification plan
turns.user: Provide a short re-run plan to confirm the cross-DC state is stabilizing and not a partial result.

turns.name: Compact summary
turns.user: Summarize final cross-DC findings in 6 bullets with UTC timestamps, participating DC count, and unresolved blockers.
